components.name: JobCard
components.description: Swipeable job summary card. Left-swipe reveals Maps/Call actions; right-swipe reveals Start/Resume timer. Tap navigates to JobDetail.

props.name: onStartTimer
props.description: (job) => void — called when user triggers start timer

props.name: isStarting
props.description: Shows loading state on the start button

components.name: TimerPanel
components.description: Live timer display for active jobs. Shows elapsed time, current state (working/break/travel/paused). CTA buttons transition state and write TimeEntry records with client_request_id for idempotency.

accessibility.haptics: haptic(success) on start; haptic(stop) on pause/end

components.name: EvidenceTile
components.description: Compact evidence thumbnail with QC state overlay. Resolves display state from evidence.status + quality_score + face_detected. Exports resolveState() and QcBadge for reuse.

aria: role=img with aria-label describing type + QC state

components.name: CameraOverlay
components.description: Full-screen camera capture modal with reticle guide, GPS location badge, tag selection, and serial-number OCR hint. Handles both native camera input and fallback file-input flow.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Pill badge for Job.status and SyncQueue.sync_status.

components.name: QuickActionsBar
components.description: Horizontally scrollable row of 60×60px action buttons (Photo, Attach, Note, Safety, More). Opens bottom sheets for each action.

components.name: EvidenceCapture
components.description: Multi-step capture orchestrator: source → metadata (single) | gallery (multi) → upload queue. Manages CameraOverlay, GalleryImport, EvidenceMetadataForm, UploadQueue sub-steps.

components.name: DailyTimeline
components.description: Vertical pixel-mapped timeline of work/travel/break segments. Drag handles adjust start/end times. Writes TimeEntry updates with client_request_id idempotency.

components.name: AdminShell
components.description: Sidebar + topbar layout wrapper for all /Admin* pages. Not part of the global Layout — imported directly by each admin page.

components.name: OfflineBanner
components.description: Persistent amber banner shown when navigator.onLine=false. Shows pending sync count.

components.name: SyncIndicator
components.description: Floating pill at top of screen showing online/offline state and pending/failed sync counts. role=status, aria-live=polite.

components.name: RunbookView
components.description: Multi-phase runbook renderer. Phases are sequentially gated — a phase unlocks only when all required steps in the previous phase are complete.
